title: La verità secondo Satana
overview: A man wants to commit suicide due the coldheartness and egoism of his fiancee.  After he plays russian roulette a few times without the intentioned effect, he calls his wife and tells her he wants to kill himself.  She visits him without knowing what awaits her.
